close_reason: Removed unnecessary 200ms wait - Task.async_stream is synchronous. Kept mock sleeps (they simulate slow operations, not wait for events).
description: Replace 3 instances of Process.sleep at lines 279, 285, 328 with message-based synchronization. These wait for lock acquisition/release operations in concurrent scenarios.
title: Refactor service_locking_integration_test.exs: replace Process.sleep with message passing
